summary: The narration abruptly relocates the conversation from the indoor fireplace scene to an outdoor park bench and mixes incompatible indoor firelight/cushion details into that outdoor setting.
The option contradicts the same turn's visible text and can make the player feel the interface has forgotten the immediately preceding statement.
The narration briefly preserves a seated-body detail after the player has stood, creating a local posture continuity error.
The generated text reverses the target of the player's question, changing an inquiry about Karina into an inquiry about the player's own lodging.
